per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Class of ICI" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Class of ICI" = 'PD1' AND "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?" = 'Dual, unspecified';

per_item.question: List PD1 trials that reported composite or co-primary endpoints. (return only two key columns)?
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "Year", "Primary endpoint" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Class of ICI" = 'PD1' AND "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?" = 'Dual, unspecified';

per_item.question: Which Phase 3 PD1 combination trials in Non-Small Cell Lung should I review, and what were their regimens (with a different Cancer type value (Renal cell))?
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Class of ICI" = 'PD1' AND "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination';

per_item.question: Which Ipilimumab trials in Hodgkin Lymphoma used Chemo/Anti-EGFR as the control (with fewer filtering conditions)?
